name: subscription-triad
description: Plan with Codex, review with Fable, and execute with Grok through one temporary feature authorization without project network configuration.

interface.shortDescription: One-authorization planning and execution via subscription CLIs
interface.longDescription: A zero-project-config, fail-closed Codex workflow that uses one temporary provider authorization per feature, binds Fable approval to an exact plan hash, dispatches Grok Build through OAuth, and requires Codex verification.
defaultPrompt: Use $subscription-triad to implement this feature through the full gated workflow.
Use $subscription-triad to check provider readiness without executing anything.
Use $subscription-triad to resume the approved Grok execution and verify the result.
